integrations.name: Gmail
integrations.description: Send, read, search, and manage emails
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Google account in the popup
That's it — you can now send and read emails

integrations.name: Google Drive
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Google account in the popup
Your Drive files will be accessible

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.description: Repos, issues, pull requests, code search
setupSteps: If you have GitHub CLI (gh) installed, your token is detected automatically — just click Connect
Otherwise: go to github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → Personal Access Tokens
Click 'Generate new token', name it 'Delt', select repo access
Copy the token and paste it below

integrations.name: Slack
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Slack workspace in the popup
Your channels and messages will be accessible

integrations.name: Notion
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with Notion and select which pages to share
Your Notion workspace will be accessible

integrations.name: Linear
setupSteps: Go to Linear → Settings (gear icon) → Account → API
Click 'Create key' under Personal API Keys
Give it a label like 'Delt' and click Create
Copy the key that appears

integrations.name: Stripe
setupSteps: Go to dashboard.stripe.com and sign in
Click Developers → API Keys in the top nav
Copy your Secret key (starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_)
Tip: use a Test mode key first to try it safely

integrations.name: HubSpot
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your HubSpot account in the popup
Your CRM data will be accessible

integrations.name: Shopify
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Shopify store in the popup
Your products, orders, and customers will be accessible

integrations.name: Trello
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Trello account in the popup
Your boards and cards will be accessible

integrations.name: Figma
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Figma account in the popup
Your design files will be accessible

integrations.name: Microsoft 365
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Microsoft account in the popup
Your Outlook, OneDrive, and Office apps will be accessible

integrations.name: Salesforce
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Salesforce account in the popup
Your CRM data will be accessible

integrations.name: Dropbox
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Dropbox account in the popup
Your files will be accessible

integrations.name: Zoom
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Zoom account in the popup
Your meetings and recordings will be accessible

integrations.name: Airtable
setupSteps: Click Connect below
Sign in with your Airtable account in the popup
Your bases and tables will be accessible

integrations.name: Custom API
integrations.description: Connect any service that has an API key
setupSteps: Find the API docs for the service you want to connect
Look for 'API Keys' or 'Developer Settings' in their settings
Create a new API key and paste it below
